transactions.desc: The Nationals recalled Chaparro from Triple-A Rochester on Tuesday.
The Nationals recalled Crews from Triple-A Rochester on Tuesday.
Wiemer (hand) was optioned to Triple-A Rochester on Tuesday.
The Mets selected Severino's contract from Triple-A Syracuse and optioned him to Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Mets recalled Morabito from Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday, Will Sammon of The Athletic reports.
The Twins recalled Adams from Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday.
The Orioles designated Handley for assignment Tuesday.
The Orioles selected Suarez's contract from Triple-A Norfolk on Tuesday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Orioles optioned Foster to Triple-A Norfolk on Tuesday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Twins selected Jackson's contract from Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday, Aaron Gleeman of AaronGleeman.com reports.
The Twins designated Topa for assignment Tuesday, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.
The Twins selected Arcia's contract from Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.
The Twins optioned Lewis to Triple-A St. Paul on Tuesday, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.
Atlanta recalled Mederos from Triple-A Gwinnett on Tuesday.
Atlanta released Bummer on Tuesday.
Atlanta reinstated Dodd (back) from the 15-day injured list Tuesday.
Atlanta selected Tromp's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Tuesday.
Atlanta optioned Ritchie to Triple-A Gwinnett on Tuesday.
The Mets designated Slater for assignment Tuesday, Jon Heyman of the New York Post reports.
House was optioned to Triple-A Rochester on Monday.
Bukauskas (lat) was activated from the 7-day injured list Saturday.
Stefanic was sent outright to Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday, Jason Burke of SI.com reports.
McDermott was optioned to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Monday.
Hernandez signed a contract with the Dodgers on Monday.
Castano was optioned to Triple-A Albuquerque on Monday, Patrick Saunders of The Denver Post reports.
Agnos was recalled from Triple-A Albuquerque on Monday, Patrick Saunders of The Denver Post reports.
Fulford was recalled from Triple-A Albuquerque on Monday, Patrick Saunders of The Denver Post reports.
The Orioles optioned Handley to Triple-A Norfolk on Monday.
The Orioles activated Holliday (hand) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Rangers recalled Helman from Triple-A Round Rock on Monday.
